folio.label: 187v
folio.l: Here bigynneth the ¸loge of the Nonnes prest ,

note.notetxt: IR Written in the header in brownODR

folio.l: Hoo q¶ the knygút , good sire nomore of this
That ©e han seid , is rigút I now I wys
And mochel more , for litel heuynesse
Is rigút I now , for mechil folk I gesse
I seye for me , it is a gret dissese
Where as men han ben , in gret welthe & ese
To heren of here sodeyn fal allas
And the contrie is ioye , & gret solas
As whan a man hatú ben , in poure estat
And clymbetú vp , and wexetú fortunat
And there abydetú , in ¸s¹itee
Swicú thyngö is gladsom , as it thynketú me
And of swicú thyngö , were goodly for to telle
ña q¶ oure hoost , by Seynt´ Poules belle
ñe seye rigút sotú , this monke he clappetú loude
He spak how fortune , couered was w a cloude
I not neuäe what , and als of a tragedie
Rigút now ©e herde , and parde no remedie
Is it , for to be wayllen , ne compleyne
idid æatq¶q¶ is don , and als it is a peyne4-16 id q¶is written in the space between lines 4-15 and 4-16. This tag needs double checking, also double check the meaning.CS/ODR
As ©e han seide , to heere of heuynesse
Sire Monke no more of this , so god yow blisse
ñoure tale anoyetú , al this compaignye
Swicú thyngö is nat wortú , a boterflye
For æäe Inne is ther no , disporte ne game
Wherfore sire Monke , o daun Piers by thy name
I preye yow hertily , telle vs som what elles
For sikerly , nere clynkyngö of ©oure belles
That oon ©oure bridel hange , oon euäy syde
By heuene kyngö , æ for vs alle dyde
I shulde er this , haue fallen doun for slepe
Al thougú the slougú , had neuäe ben so depe

note.notetxt: 12 A small cross is in the left margin next to this line. RJ

folio.l: Tha~ne had ©oure tale , al ben tolde in veyn
For certeynly , as æ theise Clerkes seyn
Where as a man , may haue noon audience
Nat helpetú it , to tellen his sentence
And wel I woot , the substau~ce is in me
If any thyngö , shal wel reported be
Sire seye somwhat , of huntyngö I ©ow preye
¢ Nay q¶ this Monke , I haue no lust to pleye
Now lat another telle , as I haue tolde
Tha~ne spak oure hoost , w rude speche & bolde
And seide , vn to the No~nes preest a noon

note.notetxt: 23 There is a page missing from the manuscript (folios 188r and 188v) including lines 24 through end. CS
